body: LeBron James is expected to start tonight vs Boston and is "locked in" on breaking the record at home, per sources.
LeBron is hunting every possession. 26 pts on 10/14 shooting — looks like the record falls tonight.
Lakers have completely taken over this quarter. 12-2 run and the Celtics have called timeout. Energy in the building is unreal.
Saka looks sharp. That's his first goal since the injury — took the shot early, keeper had no chance. Arsenal completely dominant now.
Mahomes is moving like himself again. That TD to Kelce was vintage — 22-yard strike on the run. Ankle looks like a non-issue right now.
Patrick Mahomes looked "explosive" in practice today according to teammates. He's been dealing with ankle injury since Week 12.
Arsenal are unbeaten in 14 straight home matches. Chelsea haven't won at the Emirates since 2021.
